description_long: This is a modern grave monument composed of a rectangular stone base with a raised platform and a vertical headstone. The headstone is made of polished black granite, featuring a white engraved cross and inscriptions, and is set at the rear of the grave. The platform is constructed from a lighter gray stone, possibly marble or granite, and is slightly elevated above the main base. The entire structure sits on a larger, flat, light-gray stone slab that serves as the foundation. The monument's clean lines and contrasting stone colors give it a contemporary appearance. The inscriptions and cross on the headstone are clearly visible, adding a solemn and respectful touch.
description: A modern grave monument with a black granite headstone, white cross and inscriptions, and a raised gray stone platform on a light-gray stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black granite headstone with a white cross and inscriptions, set on a gray stone platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the layered structure of the gray stone platform.
description_view_2: Direct view of the headstone's face, clearly displaying the cross and engraved inscriptions, with the platform and base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the depth of the platform and the headstone's profile.
